feedback.text: As a Czech citizen, I support efforts to protect consumers from unfair commercial practices, such as completely restricting the playability of purchased games (whether digital or physical). It would therefore be great if this law also applied to controversial practices such as: Selling video games as licenses without a clear "apparent" end date for support. This can lead to users unknowingly purchasing media whose support may be terminated within a few years, without any compensation or refund, rendering them unusable. Thank you for your consideration.
